  • Uses of AudioBuffer in org.jscience.core.media.audio.ops

    Classes in org.jscience.core.media.audio.ops that implement interfaces with type arguments of type AudioBuffer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AudioEqualizerOp
    Audio operation that applies a biquad filter (LowPass, HighPass, etc.).
    class 
    GainOp
    Adjusts the volume/gain of an AudioBuffer.
    class 
    InvertOp
    Inverts the phase of an AudioBuffer.
    class 
    MonoOp
    Converts a multi-channel AudioBuffer to mono.
    class 
    NormalizationOp
    Normalizes an AudioBuffer to a target peak amplitude.
